name: Amakour
overview: The series takes place in the fifties of the last century, where Abdul Wahab falls into several comedic paradoxes because of his limited intelligence, which causes many problems for his father, while he seeks to marry his girlfriend (Hida)

trailers.title: مسلسل عماكور - الحلقة 1 - عبدالناصر درويش و حسن البلام
